name: DNA X, Inc.
business: We are a provider of crypto trading services to the public. We serve individual cryptocurrency traders around the world. Our products allow users to efficiently buy and sell cryptocurrencies with cash or cash equivalents, or to exchange one cryptocurrency for another cryptocurrency.

exposures.sentence: Our products allow users to efficiently buy and sell cryptocurrencies with cash or cash equivalents, or to exchange one cryptocurrency for another cryptocurrency.

catalysts.event: Add additional features and products to the platform
catalysts.sentence: We plan to add additional features and products to the platform throughout 2026 as we execute our growth strategy.
